settings.name: System Theme (Light/Dark)
settings.description: Theme for system elements (taskbar, start menu)

settings.name: Accent Color
settings.description: Windows accent color in BGR format

settings.name: Accent Color on Title Bars
settings.values: 1 = Show accent on title bars, 0 = Don't show
settings.description: Show accent color on window title bars

settings.name: Show Accent on Start/Taskbar
settings.description: Show accent color on Start menu and taskbar

settings.name: Desktop Icon Visibility - User's Files
settings.description: Show/hide user's files folder on desktop

settings.name: Desktop Icon Size
settings.description: Size of desktop icons in pixels

settings.name: Visual Effects - Animations
settings.description: Complex binary value controlling visual effects

settings.name: Show Shadows Under Mouse
settings.description: Show pop-up descriptions for folder items

settings.name: Empty Drives
settings.description: Hide empty drives in Computer folder

settings.name: Navigation Pane - Show All Folders
settings.description: Show all folders in navigation pane

settings.name: Navigation Pane - Expand to Open Folder
Quick Access - Show Recent Files
settings.description: Show recently used files in Quick Access

settings.name: Quick Access - Show Frequent Folders
settings.description: Show frequently used folders in Quick Access

settings.name: File Explorer - Open to Quick Access
settings.description: Default location when opening File Explorer

settings.name: Check Boxes to Select Items
settings.description: Show check boxes for item selection

settings.name: Item Check Boxes
settings.description: Enable check boxes for item selection

settings.name: File Explorer - View Type
settings.description: Binary value containing view settings (Details, Icons, List, etc.)

settings.name: Folder Merge Conflicts
settings.description: How to handle folder merge conflicts

settings.name: Sharing Wizard
settings.description: Use Sharing Wizard for network sharing

settings.name: Recycle Bin - Maximum Size
settings.description: Maximum size of Recycle Bin for each drive (percentage)

settings.name: Recycle Bin - Files Removed Immediately
settings.values: 0 = Send to Recycle Bin, 1 = Remove immediately
settings.description: Don't move files to Recycle Bin, delete immediately

settings.name: Folder Tips
settings.description: Show pop-up descriptions for folder items

settings.name: File Explorer - Display Size Info
settings.description: Display file size information in folder tips

settings.name: Encrypted/Compressed Files in Color
settings.description: Show encrypted/compressed files in alternate color

settings.name: Always Show Icons, Never Thumbnails
settings.description: Show icons instead of file thumbnails

settings.name: Display File Icon on Thumbnails
settings.description: Display file type icon on thumbnails

settings.name: Separate Process for Folder Windows
settings.description: Launch folder windows in separate processes

settings.name: Taskbar Location on Screen
settings.description: Binary value containing taskbar position (Bottom, Top, Left, Right)

settings.name: Taskbar Chat Icon
settings.description: Show chat icon (Microsoft Teams) on taskbar

settings.name: Taskbar Task View Button
settings.description: Show Task View button on taskbar

settings.name: Taskbar Search Box
settings.description: Control search box appearance on taskbar

settings.name: Taskbar Corner Icons - Pen Menu
settings.description: Show pen menu icon in system tray

settings.name: Taskbar Corner Icons - Touch Keyboard
settings.description: Show touch keyboard icon in system tray

settings.name: Taskbar Corner Icons - Virtual Touchpad
settings.description: Show virtual touchpad icon in system tray

settings.name: Combine Taskbar Buttons
settings.values: 0 = Always combine, 1 = Combine when full, 2 = Never combine
settings.description: Control how taskbar buttons are grouped

settings.name: Multiple Displays - Show Taskbar on All Displays
Multiple Displays - Where to Show Buttons
settings.values: 0 = All taskbars, 1 = Main taskbar, 2 = Taskbar where window is open
settings.description: Control where taskbar buttons appear on multiple displays

settings.name: Multiple Displays - Combine Buttons on Other Taskbars
settings.description: Button combining behavior on secondary taskbars

settings.name: Start Menu - Show Recently Added Apps
settings.description: Highlight newly installed apps in Start menu

settings.name: Start Menu - Show Most Used Apps
settings.description: Show most used apps in Start menu

settings.name: Start Menu - Show Suggestions
settings.description: Show app suggestions in Start menu

settings.name: Start Menu - Show Recently Opened Items
settings.description: Show recently opened items in Start menu

settings.name: Start Menu Layout XML
settings.description: Binary data containing Start menu layout configuration

settings.name: Pinned Taskbar Apps
settings.description: Binary list of pinned taskbar applications

settings.name: Pinned Start Menu Apps
settings.description: Binary list of pinned Start menu items

settings.name: Active Power Plan
settings.description: GUID of currently active power plan

settings.name: Monitor Timeout (Plugged In)
settings.description: Minutes before monitor turns off when plugged in

settings.name: Monitor Timeout (On Battery)
settings.description: Minutes before monitor turns off on battery

settings.name: Sleep Timeout (Plugged In)
settings.description: Minutes before PC sleeps when plugged in

settings.name: Sleep Timeout (On Battery)
settings.description: Minutes before PC sleeps on battery

settings.name: Hibernate Timeout (Plugged In)
settings.description: Complex - requires reading subkeys per power scheme

settings.name: Hibernate Timeout (On Battery)
settings.description: Similar to above, under DC subkey

settings.name: Lid Close Action (Plugged In)
settings.values: 0 = Do nothing, 1 = Sleep, 2 = Hibernate, 3 = Shut down
settings.description: Action when laptop lid is closed (plugged in)

settings.name: Lid Close Action (On Battery)
settings.description: Action when laptop lid is closed (on battery)

settings.name: Power Button Action (Plugged In)
settings.description: Action when power button pressed (plugged in)

settings.name: Power Button Action (On Battery)
settings.description: Action when power button pressed (on battery)

settings.name: Sleep Button Action (Plugged In)
settings.description: Action when sleep button pressed (plugged in)

settings.name: Sleep Button Action (On Battery)
settings.description: Action when sleep button pressed (on battery)

settings.name: Hard Disk Turn Off After (Plugged In)
settings.description: Turn off hard disk after (plugged in)

settings.name: Hard Disk Turn Off After (On Battery)
settings.description: Turn off hard disk after (on battery)

settings.name: PCI Express Link State Power Management (Plugged In)
PCI Express Link State Power Management (On Battery)
Processor Power Management - Minimum State (Plugged In)
Processor Power Management - Minimum State (On Battery)
Processor Power Management - Maximum State (Plugged In)
Processor Power Management - Maximum State (On Battery)
Processor Power Management - System Cooling Policy (Plugged In)
Processor Power Management - System Cooling Policy (On Battery)
Wireless Adapter Power Saving Mode (Plugged In)
settings.values: 0 = Maximum Performance, 1 = Medium, 2 = Maximum Power Saving

settings.name: Wireless Adapter Power Saving Mode (On Battery)
Battery Level to Enter Critical Action
settings.description: Battery level that triggers critical action

settings.name: Critical Battery Action
settings.description: Action when battery reaches critical level

settings.name: Low Battery Notification
settings.description: Show notification when battery is low

settings.name: Low Battery Action
settings.description: Action when battery reaches low level

settings.name: Account Info Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access account info

settings.name: Call History Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access call history

settings.name: App Diagnostics Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access diagnostic info

settings.name: Documents Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access Documents folder

settings.name: Pictures Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access Pictures folder

settings.name: Videos Access
settings.description: Allow apps to access Videos folder

settings.name: File System Access (Broad)
settings.description: Allow apps to access entire file system

settings.name: Advertising ID
settings.description: Allow apps to use advertising ID

settings.name: Activity History
settings.description: Store activity history on this device

settings.name: Publish Activity to Timeline
settings.description: Let Windows collect my activities from this PC

settings.name: Suggested Content in Settings
settings.description: Show suggested content in Settings app

settings.name: Tailored Experiences
settings.description: Let Microsoft use diagnostic data for tailored experiences

settings.name: Camera Access for Desktop Apps
settings.description: Camera access for traditional desktop apps

settings.name: Microphone Access for Desktop Apps
settings.description: Microphone access for traditional desktop apps

settings.name: Location Access for Desktop Apps
settings.description: Location access for traditional desktop apps

settings.name: Feedback Frequency
settings.description: How often Windows asks for feedback

settings.name: Mouse - Scroll Lines
settings.values: -1 = One screen, 0 = No scrolling, 1-100 = Number of lines
settings.description: Lines to scroll per mouse wheel notch

settings.name: Mouse - Scroll Wheel Delta
settings.description: Characters to scroll horizontally per wheel notch

settings.name: Mouse - Snap to Default Button
settings.description: Automatically move mouse to default dialog button

settings.name: Mouse - Cursor Scheme
settings.values: Windows Default, Windows Black, Windows Inverted, etc.

settings.name: Touchpad - Scrolling Direction
settings.values: 0 = Down motion scrolls down, 1 = Down motion scrolls up

settings.name: Touchpad - Three-Finger Gestures
settings.values: 0 = Disable, 1 = Enable (Cortana), 2 = Enable (Action Center), 3 = Enable (Play/Pause), 4 = Enable (Middle Click)

settings.name: First Day of Week
settings.values: 0 = Monday, 1 = Tuesday, 2 = Wednesday, 3 = Thursday, 4 = Friday, 5 = Saturday, 6 = Sunday

settings.name: Leading Zeros
settings.values: 0 = No leading zeros, 1 = Show leading zeros
settings.description: Show leading zeros in decimal numbers

settings.name: Time Zone
settings.example: Eastern Standard Time, Pacific Standard Time

settings.name: Sticky Keys
settings.description: Enable Sticky Keys (press one key at a time for shortcuts)

settings.name: Toggle Keys
settings.description: Hear tones when pressing Caps Lock, Num Lock, Scroll Lock

settings.name: Mouse Keys - Acceleration
settings.description: Time to reach maximum Mouse Keys speed

settings.name: Visual Notifications for Sound
settings.values: 2 = Flash active window, 6 = Flash desktop, etc.
settings.description: Show visual alerts for sounds (Sound Sentry)

settings.name: Game Bar - Controller Shortcut
settings.description: Open Game Bar with Xbox button on controller

settings.name: Visual Effects - Adjust for Best Performance
settings.values: 0 = Let Windows choose, 1 = Best appearance, 2 = Best performance, 3 = Custom

settings.name: Animate Controls and Elements
settings.description: Complex binary - controls various animation settings
